source_metadata.title: 2025/11/20- TI
source_metadata.description:
Thursday 20 November 2025 - Transport and Infrastructure Committee

Local Government (Auckland Council) (Transport Governance) Amendment Bill

Hearing of Evidence:

David Boulton

National Road Carriers

Justin Tighe-Umbers
